consensus_variance.line_item: APD forward P/E multiple (re-rate vs the Linde discount) driven by the FY2027 FCF inflection
consensus_variance.narrative: The Street's 39%-Hold cohort prices APD at a sustained ~20-21x forward P/E (a permanent ~7-8-turn discount to Linde), skeptical the FCF inflects and the discount narrows. Our load-bearing variance: the capex roll-off ($7.0B FY25 peak -> ~$4.0B FY26), the ~$3.7B of charges already taken, and two FY2026 guidance raises with a Q2 beat make a FY2027 FCF inflection + re-rate toward ~24.5x ~60% likely (sizing_impact_pp = 20 x 60 x 20 / 10000 = 2.4). Puts our PT-implied return +25.8% ~10pp above consensus (+16%). Two-tailed/catalyst-dependent -> Buy.

revision_velocity.breadth_note: Estimates and PTs revised UP after two FY2026 guidance raises and a Q2 beat; 11 Strong Buy / 3 Buy / 9 Hold / 0 Sell. The 39% Hold cohort is the variance target.
revision_velocity.pre_print_drift: Stock +15-16% YTD on the activist catalyst; next print ~2026-08-06.
revision_velocity.peer_comparison: APD at a wide discount to Linde (~28x) / Air Liquide (~25x); the re-rating gap is the opportunity.
revision_velocity.verdict: Estimates rising + two guidance raises; the non-consensus edge is the FCF-inflection-driven re-rate the 39%-Hold cohort under-credits.
